examples: Only rarely will she indulge in a glass of wine.
They went into town to indulge in some serious shopping.
The inheritance enabled him to indulge his passion for art.
You can also indulge in creative versions containing everything from ice cream to Iberico ham and black truffle.
Indulge in a whole avocado, and rack up 250 calories and 22.5 grams of fat.
